calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Set For Trial On May-23-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Yasmin Firoozbadys To Consolidate Actions For Purposes Of Case Management Discovery And Trial
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF YASMIN FIROOZABADY'S Motion Of Plaintiff Yasmin Firoozbadys To Consolidate Actions For Purposes Of Case Management Discovery And Trial is taken off calendar. Parties to schedule new hearing date with Department 501. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Y Asmin Firoozabadys Motion For Leave To File Amended And Supplemental Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CHRISTINA L. CHEN, ESQ. of Jeffer Mangels Butler & Mitchell LLP, Tel No. 415-984-9680 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Matter argued by Plaintiff's counsel. Plaintiff's counsel provides the Court with a copy of a proof of service. Matter submitted. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and rules as follows: PLAINTIFF YASMIN FIROOZABADY'S Motion For Leave To File Amended And Supplemental Complaint is granted as unopposed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
